seoTitle: Lawes vs Lawn Hill — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lawes and Lawn Hill. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lawes vs Lawn Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lawes and Lawn Hill.
heading: Lawes vs Lawn Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lawes, Queensland and Lawn Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lawes has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Lawn Hill (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lawes or Lawn Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lawes has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Lawn Hill scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lawes scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Lawn Hill scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lawes or Lawn Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lawes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
